_note: Per-game visual-identity research for the follow-overlay sprite + theme work. Sources: Steam store pages (Claude in Chrome, 2026-06-02) + established franchise art direction. item=most iconic object for a sprite; style=aesthetic cue for the Replicate prompt; palette=color direction (prompt + Phase 4 bar/glow); fontWeb=Google-Fonts-ish match for Phase 4 promo/counter. Extend this for the ~20 Triple-C games at Phase 3.
_rule: ARTISTIC-ONLY (Clay 2026-06-02): every sprite must be artistic/illustrated -- painterly, cel-shaded, hand-drawn linework, stylized 2D/vector, premium cartoon/anime, or watercolor/ink. NEVER photoreal 3D renders, realistic photography, or hyperreal CGI. Even games with a realistic aesthetic (Supermarket Sim, PowerWash, Manor Lords, Witcher 3 cinematic) are interpreted artistically, not photoreal. The prompt template hard-codes 'artistic illustrated' + 'no photoreal CGI'; keep every per-game `style` value artistic.

eldenring.item: an ornate golden flask brimming with glowing crimson liquid, a Flask of Crimson Tears, weathered engraved gold filigree and a cork stopper
eldenring.style: painterly high-detail dark-fantasy game asset, dramatic chiaroscuro rim light, cel-shaded depth
eldenring.palette: tarnished Erdtree gold and deep blood crimson on near-black, muted earthy shadows

cyberpunk2077.item: a futuristic cyberware biochip implant (a Relic shard), etched holographic circuitry, glowing edge
cyberpunk2077.style: sleek high-tech sci-fi game asset, glossy industrial, sharp neon edge glow
cyberpunk2077.palette: signature acid yellow #FCEE0A and black with cyan and hot-magenta neon accents

supermarket_simulator.item: a friendly shopping cart, three-quarter view, a couple of grocery boxes in the basket
supermarket_simulator.style: flat 2D hand-drawn illustration with bold dark ink outlines and painterly cel shading, vibrant storybook poster art, completely flat (no 3D depth, no glossy render)
supermarket_simulator.palette: friendly grocery green and warm white with red accents, clean and bright

phasmophobia.item: an EMF reader handheld ghost-hunting device, worn dark plastic, a row of glowing green LED bars lit on its face
phasmophobia.style: atmospheric realistic horror game asset, moody low-key lighting, slight grain
phasmophobia.palette: near-black charcoal with eerie phosphor-green LED glow, cold desaturated

balatro.item: a stylized Joker playing card standing upright (Jimbo the joker), bold poker-art face
balatro.style: hand-crafted pixel art with subtle CRT scanline fuzz, psychedelic, bold flat shapes
balatro.palette: deep indigo-navy background, card-suit red and blue, gold accents, hint of green felt

ball_x_pit.item: a vibrant bouncing ball orb with a short motion trail, or a small cluster of colorful balls
ball_x_pit.style: colorful pixel-art arcade game asset, crisp pixels, energetic (game is 2D pixel-graphics + colorful, NOT smooth minimalist)
ball_x_pit.palette: vivid saturated arcade colors - electric cyan, magenta and lime on dark
